mapper.select: SELECT * FROM peer_reviews WHERE cycle_id = #{cycleId} AND target_user_id = #{targetUserId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM peer_reviews WHERE cycle_id = #{cycleId} AND reviewer_user_id = #{reviewerUserId} AND target_user_id = #{targetUserId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO peer_reviews (team_id, cycle_id, target_user_id, reviewer_user_id, dimension_scores_json) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{cycleId}, #{targetUserId}, #{reviewerUserId}, #{dimensionScoresJson})
